mapper.insert:
select currval('tbl_message_id_seq')
insert into tbl_message (conversation_id, sender_id, content, reply_message_id) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{replyMessageId})
mapper.select: select msg.id, msg.conversation_id, msg.sender_id, coalesce(m.member_nickname, m.member_name) as sender_name, m.member_handle as sender_handle, msg.content, msg.reply_message_id, reply_msg.content as reply_content, reply_msg.sender_id as reply_sender_id, coalesce(reply_m.member_nickname, reply_m.member_name) as reply_sender_name, msg.is_deleted, case when msg.sender_id = #{memberId} and coalesce(v.partner_last_read, 0) >= msg.id then true else false end as read_by_partner, msg.created_datetime, msg.updated_datetime, f.id as file_id, f.original_name as file_original_name, f.file_path as file_path, f.file_size as file_size, f.content_type as file_content_type from tbl_message msg join tbl_member m on m.id = msg.sender_id join v_my_chat v on v.conversation_id = msg.conversation_id and v.member_id = #{memberId} left join tbl_message reply_msg on reply_msg.id = msg.reply_message_id left join tbl_member reply_m on reply_m.id = reply_msg.sender_id left join tbl_message_deletion md on md.message_id = msg.id and md.member_id = #{memberId} left join tbl_chat_file cf on cf.message_id = msg.id left join tbl_file f on f.id = cf.id where msg.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and md.message_id is null and msg.id > coalesce( (select deleted_after_message_id from tbl_conversation_setting where conversation_id = #{conversationId} and member_id = #{memberId}), 0 ) and not ( msg.sender_id != #{memberId} and exists ( select 1 from tbl_conversation_setting cs_block where cs_block.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and cs_block.member_id = #{memberId} and cs_block.blocked_after_message_id is not null and msg.id > cs_block.blocked_after_message_id and (cs_block.block_released_message_id is null or msg.id <= cs_block.block_released_message_id) ) ) order by msg.created_datetime asc
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_message_deletion (message_id, member_id) values (#{messageId}, #{memberId}) on conflict (message_id, member_id) do nothing
